entity.title: Rule Identifier Format
entity.description: Defines the display format for Rule Identifiers within a Realm.

rules.body: DEFINES the format that Rule Identifier must comply with within a Realm.
MUST define the starting and closing character pair, allowed values: "(,)", "{,}","[,]", default is "[,]".
MUST define the position of the Entity Unique Identifier as either the opening part of the Rule Unique Identifier or as the closing part, default is opening part.
MUST define the position of the Rule Set Unique Number as taking the opposing position of the Entity Unique Identifier.
MUST define a unique Rule Identifier split character which will separate the Entity Unique Identifier and Rule Set Unique Number, allowed values are: "-", "_", default is "-".
MUST define a Rule Revision splitter which can be either "." or "#", default is ".".
MUST define a Rule State splitter which can be either "/", "\" or "|", default is "/".
